name: Korean Skewered Beef
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sesame oil or other oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice the steak into 1-inch wide strips.
2. In a bowl, mix together garlic and the rest of the ingredients (soy sauce, sesame oil, minced green onions).
3. Coat the steak strips completely with this marinade.
4. Place the coated meat in a shallow dish containing toasted sesame seeds and press to ensure even coating.
5. Let marinate for at least one hour.
6. Thread the meat onto bamboo sticks.
7. Quickly broil or fry the skewers on each side until browned, using a little oil if needed.
(Note: Toast sesame seeds by cooking them slowly in a heavy skillet until they are brown. Crush the toasted seeds with salt to create a paste.)
